description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Android CI that runs on every push and pull request. Use a single ubuntu-latest job that sets up the build environment, downgrades CMake to 3.19.x, checks out the repository with submodules, caches Gradle dependencies, builds the Android project with Gradle, uploads the APK artifact, sets up Git variables, cleans up, and syncs the APK to an S3 bucket with public read access.
